'''Zanthe Nadia''' was the leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell called the [[Pelagia Freedom Force]] that operated in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. She was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pelagon]] in the [[Pelagia Province]], and was devastated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack on her homeworld. She swore to hurt the Empire in any was possible, but yearned for a chance to make a big hit.
